scenes.npcDialog: Welcome! You booked a 6-bed dorm, right? Here's your locker key.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 환영합니다! 6인실 도미토리 예약하셨죠? 여기 락커 키입니다.

choices.text: Yes, that's correct. Where is my bed?
Thanks! Which bed is mine?
I want a private room now.
6 people? That's too many.

scenes.npcDialog: The shared kitchen is on the first floor. Do you have any questions?

choices.text: Can I store food in the fridge?
What time does the kitchen close?
Cook for me please.
I don't cook.

scenes.npcDialog: Is this your first time at a hostel?

choices.text: Yes, where are the shared bathrooms?
Where can I take a shower?
I need a private bathroom.
Hostels are dirty.

scenes.npcDialog: Your ticket includes only cabin baggage. Do you have checked luggage?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 티켓에는 기내 수하물만 포함되어 있어요. 위탁 수하물 있으세요?

choices.text: How much extra for checked baggage?
I only have carry-on, so I'm fine.
That's a rip-off!
I refuse to pay extra.

scenes.npcDialog: What can I get for you?

choices.text: One kebab, please. How much is it?
What's the cheapest thing on the menu?
Is this food safe to eat?
This looks unhealthy.

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome! Would you like a meal or just a sandwich?

choices.text: Just the burger, no combo.
How much is the value meal?
Make it free.
Fast food is terrible.

scenes.npcDialog: Will that be all?

choices.text: Yes, and can you heat this up for me?
Do you have any meal deals?
This is too expensive for a convenience store.
I want restaurant food.

scenes.npcDialog: This souvenir is 20 euros.

choices.text: Can you give me a discount? How about 15?
That's too expensive. 10 euros?
Just give it to me for free.
I'll steal it then.

scenes.npcDialog: Do you need help with the bus?

choices.text: Which bus goes to the old town?
How much is the bus fare?
Buses are for poor people.
Call me a taxi instead.

scenes.npcDialog: Are you looking for something?

choices.text: Is the museum within walking distance?
How long does it take to walk there?
Walking is for losers.
Carry me there.

scenes.npcDialog: We have a free walking tour starting at 10 AM. Interested?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 오전 10시에 무료 워킹투어가 있어요. 관심 있으세요?

choices.text: Yes! How long is the tour?
Great! Where does it start?
If it's free, it's probably bad.
I want a private tour.

scenes.npcDialog: Cooking tonight? There's a supermarket around the corner.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 오늘 저녁 요리하세요? 코너 돌면 슈퍼마켓 있어요.

choices.text: Great! Do they have fresh vegetables?
Perfect, I'll cook some pasta.
I can't cook.
Cooking is a waste of time.

scenes.npcDialog: Regular admission is 15 euros.

choices.text: Do you have any free admission days?
Is there a student discount?
That's too expensive, forget it.
Museums should be free.

scenes.npcDialog: Looking for luggage storage?

choices.text: Yes, how much for a small locker?
Where are the cheapest lockers?
I'll just leave it on the floor.
Guard my bags for me.

scenes.npcDialog: Can I help you with anything?

choices.text: Do you have free WiFi?
What's the WiFi password?
I just want WiFi, no food.
Your WiFi is too slow.

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome! You have a private room with shared bathroom. Breakfast is included!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 환영합니다! 공용 화장실이 있는 개인실이에요. 조식 포함이에요!

choices.text: Great! What time is breakfast served?
Perfect, can I see the room first?
I need an ensuite bathroom.
This isn't a real hotel.

scenes.npcDialog: Good morning! Help yourself to the breakfast buffet.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 좋은 아침이에요! 조식 뷔페 마음껏 드세요.

choices.text: Thank you! Is there fresh juice?
Great, what time does breakfast end?
This doesn't look like much.
I expected more variety.

scenes.npcDialog: Your ticket includes one checked bag. Would you like to check any luggage?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 티켓에 위탁 수하물 1개가 포함되어 있어요. 수하물 부치시겠어요?

choices.text: Yes, I have one bag to check.
Perfect, here's my suitcase.
Can I check three bags for free?
I want business class upgrade.

scenes.npcDialog: This is a local favorite. Would you like to try our special?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 현지인들이 좋아하는 곳이에요. 저희 스페셜 드셔보실래요?

choices.text: Yes, I'd love to try the local specialty!
What do you recommend?
Do you have American food?
This menu is too strange.

scenes.npcDialog: What can I get started for you?

choices.text: A latte and a slice of apple pie, please.
What pastries do you have today?
Why is coffee so expensive here?
Just give me free samples.

scenes.npcDialog: Looking for something specific?

choices.text: Where can I find local snacks?
Do you have any lunch deals?
Your store is too big.
Everything is expensive.

scenes.npcDialog: How can I help you with tickets?

choices.text: I'd like a day pass, please.
How much is an unlimited daily ticket?
Can I ride for free?
Tickets are a waste of money.

scenes.npcDialog: Need help with the tram system?

choices.text: Which line goes to the museum district?
Where do I validate my ticket?
Trams are too confusing.
Just call me a taxi.

scenes.npcDialog: We have a half-day group tour for 35 euros. Interested?

choices.text: What's included in the tour?
How big is the group usually?
That's too expensive for a group.
I want a private tour for that price.

scenes.npcDialog: Are you eligible for any discounts?

choices.text: Yes, I'm a student. Here's my ID.
Do you offer any discounts?
I should get in for free.
Discounts are for poor people.

scenes.npcDialog: Airport shuttle to the city center? It's 15 euros per person.

choices.text: Sure, when is the next one leaving?
How long does it take to the center?
That's too expensive for a shared ride.
I demand a private shuttle.

scenes.npcDialog: This is handmade by local artisans. 25 euros.

choices.text: It's beautiful! Can I see more designs?
Does it come with any certificate of authenticity?
I can buy this cheaper online.
Handmade means nothing.

scenes.npcDialog: Do you need help with the ATM?

choices.text: Can I use my foreign card here?
Is there a fee for international cards?
Why are there fees?
Give me money for free.

scenes.npcDialog: The city pass includes unlimited transport and museum entries. 60 euros for 3 days.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 시티패스에 무제한 교통과 박물관 입장이 포함되어 있어요. 3일에 60유로입니다.

choices.text: That sounds like a good deal. I'll take one.
Which museums are included?
60 euros is way too much.
I want everything for free.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to rent a bike? It's 10 euros for the day.

choices.text: Yes, please! Is a helmet included?
Do you have a city bike map?
Biking is too much effort.
I don't know how to ride.

scenes.npcDialog: Good evening! Your room is ready. Would you like an upgrade to a suite for 50 euros more?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 안녕하세요! 객실 준비되었습니다. 50유로 추가하시면 스위트룸으로 업그레이드 가능한데요?

choices.text: That sounds nice. What does the suite include?
What's the difference between the rooms?
Give me the upgrade for free.
That's a rip-off.

scenes.npcDialog: How may I assist you this evening?

choices.text: Could you recommend a nice restaurant nearby?
Can you make a reservation for me?
Find me the cheapest place.
You should know what I want.

scenes.npcDialog: Room service, how may I help you?

choices.text: I'd like to order breakfast for tomorrow morning.
Could I get a bottle of wine sent up?
Bring me everything on the menu.
Room service is too slow.

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome to business class check-in. May I see your passport?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 비즈니스 클래스 체크인에 오신 것을 환영합니다. 여권 보여주시겠어요?

choices.text: Here you go. Is the lounge open now?
Can I get priority boarding?
Where's my champagne?
Upgrade me to first class.

scenes.npcDialog: Good evening. Do you have a reservation?

choices.text: Yes, reservation for Kim at 7 PM.
I booked a table for two.
I don't need a reservation.
Just give me any table.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to try our tasting menu with wine pairing?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 와인 페어링과 함께하는 테이스팅 메뉴 드셔보시겠어요?

choices.text: That sounds wonderful. What wines are included?
Yes, please. Is there a vegetarian option?
Just bring me a burger.
Wine pairing is pretentious.

scenes.npcDialog: Shall I call a taxi for you, or would you prefer to use the app?

choices.text: Please call a taxi. I'm going to the opera house.
I'll use the app. What's the address here?
Taxis are too expensive.
I'll walk... no, actually drive me.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like a private guide for your city tour?

choices.text: Yes, can the guide speak Korean?
How much is a private half-day tour?
Private tours are overpriced.
I can guide myself.

scenes.npcDialog: The regular line is about 2 hours. Would you like skip-the-line tickets?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 일반 줄은 약 2시간 기다려야 해요. 줄 안서는 티켓 원하세요?

choices.text: Yes, how much extra is it?
Definitely, I don't want to wait.
Waiting is fine.
I should get VIP for free.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to book a spa treatment?

choices.text: Yes, what massage options do you have?
I'd like a 60-minute deep tissue massage.
Spas are a waste of money.
Give me a free massage.

scenes.npcDialog: Are you visiting from abroad? You may be eligible for tax refund.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 해외에서 오셨나요? 택스 리펀 받으실 수 있어요.

choices.text: Yes, how do I get the tax refund?
Can you prepare the documents for me?
Tax refund is too complicated.
Just give me the discount now.

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome to the lounge. May I see your boarding pass?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 라운지에 오신 것을 환영합니다. 탑승권 보여주시겠어요?

choices.text: Here you go. Where are the showers?
Is there a quiet area to work?
This lounge looks cheap.
I deserve first class lounge.

scenes.npcDialog: Here's your rental car. Would you like additional insurance coverage?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 렌터카 여기 있습니다. 추가 보험 들으시겠어요?

choices.text: What does the full coverage include?
Yes, I'd like the comprehensive insurance.
Insurance is a scam.
I never crash.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like valet parking for your vehicle?

choices.text: Yes, please. How much is it per day?
Sure, here are my keys.
Valet parking is for lazy people.
Park it for free.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like us to deliver your luggage directly to your hotel?

choices.text: That would be great! How long does it take?
Yes, what time will it arrive?
I'll carry my own bags.
Why would I pay for that?
